current_run.problem_name: Hidden Cyclic Product of Adjacent Bits Modulo 3
current_run.description: Given a secret integer s, find it by querying an oracle that computes f(x) = (x_0 * x_1 + x_1 * x_2 + ... + x_{N-2} * x_{N-1} + x_{N-1} * x_0) mod 3 where x_i is the i-th bit of x. The oracle is guaranteed to output 0 if and only if x is equal to the secret s. This problem is non-linear due to the product terms and cyclic dependency.
